# codebtorstay.org

> Guide to the codebtor stay under 11 U.S.C. Section 1301 -- protection for cosigners in Chapter 13.

codebtorstay.org is a free, open-source educational resource about codebtor stay protections in bankruptcy. Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://codebtorstay.org/: Guide to the codebtor stay -- how Chapter 13 protects your cosigners

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
